sources.title: A Golden Christmas 3 (ROMANTIC CHRISTMAS COMEDY full length in German 2023)

metadata.Plot: Bobby returns from 2 years in the Navy ready to settle down in Belmont Shores. Heather's dream is to be a director on Broadway...but for now a community theater production of Dickens' Christmas Carol, must be enough... But it is after all Christmas and strange things can happen...with the help of three golden retrievers, and a few compassionate yet pushy friends that will bring together the two unsuspecting childhood sweethearts...
metadata.Actors: Shantel VanSanten, Rob Mayes, Orson Bean
